craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post About This Home.............. Estate-like setting for this Contemporary style home w 4 Bedrooms, 2 full Bathrooms, 2 half Bathrooms & 2379 sq ft of finished living space. ~The home's front Foyer leads to an oversized Great Room w a high-ceiling, wood beams, a wall of large south-facing windows, 2 ceiling fans & small piano & is well-suited for entertaining. . ~The updated Kitchen has excellent space & is attractively laid-out w new quartz counters, a large center island, white subway tile backsplash, & appliances (including a stainless steel refrigerator, dishwasher & electric oven/range). ~The Living Room off the kitchen is a comfortable & relaxing setting w high ceilings, hardwood floors, built-in bookshelves, large windows & a sliding door to a brick patio & beautiful gardens. ~There is a formal Dining Room off the kitchen as well. ~1st Floor also includes 1 Bedroom, 2 updated half Bathrooms, & a Laundry area with washer & dryer (next to the doorway to the 2 car garage). ~2nd Floor of the home has 3 spacious Bedrooms (each with hardwood floors) & a total of 2 updated full Bathrooms.
